request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies' lack of commitment is making us vulnerable? Recent reports show that only 3 out of 10 allies meet their defense spending targets. This isn't just about money—it's about our safety. When allies don't pull their weight, it's our families who pay the price. We need to hold them accountable and ensure they step up. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
